Monika Mehto

Talent Acquisition Specialist

Hello Everyone 
We are Hiring 
🚀 Exciting Opportunity: Senior AI/ML Engineer (GenAI – Telecom Domain) | Pune (Hybrid) | Off-Role

We are actively looking for a Senior AI/ML Engineer (GenAI) with strong expertise in building real-world AI solutions, especially within the telecom ecosystem.

📍 Location:Pune (Dighi) – Hybrid
📅 Experience:7+ Years
🕒 Duration: 1-Year Contract
📌 Employment Type: Off-Role

---

🔧 Key Responsibilities:

* Design and develop APIs/microservices using Python (FastAPI, Flask, Django)
* Build and deploy GenAI-driven use cases like alarm storm reduction and energy optimization
* Integrate AI solutions with OSS/BSS, orchestration, and ITSM platforms
* Collaborate with SMEs across Wireless, Transport, Cloud, and Core domains
* Develop reusable GenAI assets (prompt libraries, frameworks)
* Support pre-sales, PoCs, and client-facing workshops

---

🧠 **Required Skills:**

* Strong hands-on experience in Python
* Experience with GenAI frameworks (LangChain, LlamaIndex, Hugging Face Transformers)
* Solid understanding of RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)
* Experience with prompt engineering, few-shot learning, or LLM fine-tuning
* Familiarity with MLOps/LLMOps tools (MLflow, Kubeflow)
* Telecom domain experience is a big plus

---

Why This Role

* Work on cutting-edge GenAI solutions applied to telecom networks
* Opportunity to collaborate with cross-functional domain experts
* Be part of building scalable, production-ready AI systems

---

📩monika@3point.in

extracted.full_content:
Rahul Kumar

Talent Acquisition Specialist at Forcecraver Technologies

Urgently looking For Data Science Researcher - AI Platform	AI Data Science, ML, Python, Healthcare/Insurance	Preferred Skillset (Nice-to-Have)

Location - Channai

🚀 We’re Hiring: Data Science Researcher – AI Platform
📍 Location: Remote (India)
 ⏳ Experience: 7+ Years
 💼 Employment Type: Contract / Full-time
We are urgently looking for a Data Science Researcher to join our AI Platform team. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys solving ambiguous business problems using data, applying statistical rigor, and building impactful ML solutions—especially in the healthcare/insurance domain.
🔹 Key Responsibilities
• Design and execute end-to-end research studies on healthcare claims data
 • Perform exploratory data analysis (EDA) on EDI 837/835 datasets
 • Identify patterns in denial rates, payer behavior & claim outcomes
 • Build, evaluate, and optimize ML models using Python (scikit-learn)
 • Define appropriate evaluation metrics (Precision, Recall, F1, AUC-ROC)
 • Apply statistical methods & causal inference techniques
 • Collaborate with data engineers for pipeline readiness
 • Translate findings into clear, actionable insights for stakeholders
 • Maintain experiment tracking, documentation & reproducibility
🔹 Required Skills
• Strong experience in Data Science, Machine Learning & Python
 • Hands-on with pandas, numpy, scikit-learn, Jupyter
 • Solid understanding of statistics: hypothesis testing, distributions, confidence intervals
 • Experience handling messy, real-world datasets
 • Ability to communicate insights clearly to technical & non-technical audiences
🔹 Nice to Have
• Experience in Healthcare / Insurance domain
 • Knowledge of EDI (837/835) & Revenue Cycle Management (RCM)
 • Familiarity with causal inference (DiD, PSM, Instrumental Variables)
 • Experience in Explainable/Interpretable ML
 • Background in statistics, mathematics, or quantitative fields
🔹 What We’re Looking For
✔ Strong problem-solving mindset
 ✔ Ability to convert ambiguity into structured analysis
 ✔ Focus on accuracy, transparency, and reproducibility
 ✔ Collaborative and research-driven approach



If interested please share your resume on my whatsaap no. +91 7290886364 or rahulk@forcecraver.com.

Follow Rahul Kumar for more job updates.
